ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., PC, mobile, tablet) */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area where the device is primarily located */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Device manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Device model */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating System of the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating System version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_points" (
  "access_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access point */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the access point */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the access point */,
  "location_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the access point's location */,
  "location_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the access point's location */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area where the access point is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the devices table */,
  "access_point_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the access_points table */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the measurement was taken */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength from the access point */,
  "distance_to_ap" REAL /* Distance from the device to the access point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the measurement */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the measurement */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the measurement */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week of the measurement */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the measurement */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the measurement */,
  "location_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the device's location */,
  "location_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the device's location */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., S1, S2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_measurements_access_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_point_id") REFERENCES access_points ("access_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_measurements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Technician, Viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., Signal Strength, Device List) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the report was generated */,
  "report_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to generate the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
